nasb.text: In the four corners of the court there were enclosed courts, forty cubits long and thirty wide; these four in the corners were the same size.

esv.text: in the four corners of the court were small courts, forty cubits long and thirty broad; the four were of the same size.

cnv.text: 院子四個角落的小院子，每個長二十公尺，寬十五公尺；四個角落的院子，大小都是一樣。

ccb.text: 每个庭院的四周都有围墙，长二十米，宽十五米，四角的庭院大小都一样。
